name: Submarine Craft
short_description: The Submarine Craft is a freely built water crafts to batter and explore the ocean. Through your own handcrafted submarine, you can fight the enemy or explore the ocean.
detailed_description:
SubmarineCraft is a game that allows you to freely construct watercraft for exploring the ocean.

Dive into uncharted depths with your self-built submarine, navigate past erupting undersea volcanoes, or discover ancient ruins slumbering on the seabed.

Here, you can freely build vintage steamships, high-tech super submarines, or deep-sea research submersibles. Every block in the game has its own physical properties. The game features real-time physics simulation for all aspects—including buoyancy—replacing traditional health bars.

【Game Features】

1. 3D and 2D Editors

The game provides a 3D editor for designing the exterior model of your submarine, and a 2D editor for constructing its internal structure. A well-designed submarine requires careful consideration of both its internal (2D) and external (3D) layouts.

2. Physics Simulation

In the 3D view, the game primarily simulates collisions. Other physical aspects are simulated in the 2D view, such as temperature and pressure. Submarines ascend and descend by adjusting the amount of water in their ballast tanks. Using the game's physics engine, you can also build offshore factories to process mined underwater ores and expand your maritime enterprise.

3. Career Mode

Start with just a few wooden planks and grow into a shipping tycoon; begin with a small warehouse and build it into an ocean-spanning conglomerate. Are you ready for this journey?
